items.name_en: [Highest Version Original Leather Top Tier Factory Match Full Counter Packaging] This CarryAll Dark Medium bag is crafted from soft lambskin to create a fashionable, relaxed silhouette, adding a striking touch to 2024 Spring/Summer runway looks. Polished metal hardware complements the soft grained texture. Ample space accommodates various daily essentials, making it a perfect travel companion.

items.name_en: 【Top version factory leather, top-tier single piece with full counter packaging】This CarryAll Cargo small handbag features soft lambskin with a stylish wrinkled effect. Paired with polished metal hardware and a relaxed silhouette against a deep background, it is a perfect choice for day and night. Removable shoulder and chain straps offer versatile styling.

items.name_cn:
💰
Top-tier original, code-changed chip M13014
This CarryAll BB Handbag is crafted from Monogram canvas, adorned with eye-catching chain embellishments and Monogram flowers, lighting up day and night with a trendy look. The leather brand and drawstring closure complement each other, while a zippered interior pocket offers convenient access for daily use.
17 x 10 x 26 cm
(H x W x D)
Monogram coated canvas
Calfskin trim
Fabric lining
Hardware
Drawstring and magnetic snap closure
Zippered interior pocket
Branding
Fits smartphone, keys, Zippy wallet, and headphones
Strap: non-detachable, adjustable
Strap half-length: 40.0 cm
Strap half-length adjustable to: 50.0 cm
Handle: single handle, detachable
